note: Ketma-ket (sequential) rejim: skript ro'yxat tartibida keyingi yuborilmagan postni tashlaydi. 'title' va 'emoji' rasm-karta uchun. 'answer' bo'lsa - test, javob kechikib yuboriladi.

posts.title: 3 Easy Words
posts.text:
🔤 WORD OF THE DAY · A1

📌 happy /ˈhæpi/ — baxtli
📌 friend /frend/ — do'st
📌 home /həʊm/ — uy

💬 I am happy at home with my friend.
(Do'stim bilan uyda baxtliman.)

#vocabulary #A1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Did you know?
posts.text:
🤯 DID YOU KNOW?

English has about 170,000 words — but an average person uses only 3,000 in daily life!

🇺🇿 Ingliz tilida ~170,000 so'z bor, lekin kundalik hayotda odam atigi 3,000 tasini ishlatadi. Demak ko'p so'z yodlash shart emas — eng kerakliларini o'rganing!

💡 word /wɜːd/ — so'z

#fact #motivation #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: My Family
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · A1 — My Family

Useful words:
• mother /ˈmʌðə/ — ona
• father /ˈfɑːðə/ — ota
• sister /ˈsɪstə/ — opa/singil
• brother /ˈbrʌðə/ — aka/uka

💬 I have a big family. I love my mother and father.

✍️ Your turn: "I have ___ brothers and ___ sisters."

#topic #A1 #speaking #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Quick Test
posts.text:
📝 GRAMMAR TEST · A2

She ____ to school every day.

A) go
B) goes
C) going
D) gone

💭 30 soniyada javob toping! 👇
posts.answer:
✅ Javob: B) goes

📖 Present Simple'da he/she/it bilan fe'lga -s/-es qo'shiladi.

#test #grammar #A2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: How to learn faster
posts.text:
💡 LEARNING TIP

Learn words in groups, not alone!

Instead of just "apple", learn:
red apple 🍎, green apple, sweet apple, to eat an apple.

🇺🇿 So'zni yolg'iz emas, gap ichida yodlang — miya kontekst bilan tezroq eslab qoladi.

#tip #vocabulary #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Daily Verbs
posts.text:
🔤 USEFUL VERBS · A2

📌 improve /ɪmˈpruːv/ — yaxshilamoq
📌 practice /ˈpræktɪs/ — mashq qilmoq
📌 remember /rɪˈmembə/ — eslamoq

💬 Practice every day to improve your English.
(Inglizchangizni yaxshilash uchun har kuni mashq qiling.)

#vocabulary #A2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Most spoken language
posts.text:
🌐 DID YOU KNOW?

English is the official language of the sky ✈️ — all pilots and air traffic controllers must speak English, no matter their country!

🇺🇿 Osmonning rasmiy tili — ingliz tili. Barcha uchuvchilar qaysi davlatdan bo'lishidan qat'i nazar ingliz tilida gaplashadi.

#fact #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: to be: am/is/are
posts.text:
📚 GRAMMAR · A1 — to be

I ➡️ am
He / She / It ➡️ is
You / We / They ➡️ are

💬 I am a student. She is a teacher. They are friends.

⚠️ Xato: ❌ He are happy → ✅ He is happy

#grammar #A1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: Uzbekistan
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · B1 — My Country

• ancient city — qadimiy shahar
• tradition — an'ana
• hospitality — mehmondo'stlik
• landmark — diqqatga sazovor joy

💬 Uzbekistan is famous for its ancient cities like Samarkand and Bukhara, and for the hospitality of its people.

✍️ IELTS Speaking: "Describe your country."

#topic #B1 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Vocabulary Test
posts.text:
📝 VOCAB TEST · B1

The noise was too ____ to sleep.

A) loud
B) tall
C) heavy
D) wide

💭 Javob 👇
posts.answer:
✅ Javob: A) loud

📖 loud = baland (ovoz). tall=bo'yi baland, heavy=og'ir, wide=keng.

#test #vocabulary #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Idiom: Piece of cake
posts.text:
🗣 IDIOM OF THE DAY

🍰 "a piece of cake" — juda oson ish

💬 The exam was a piece of cake!
(Imtihon juda oson edi!)

🇺🇿 So'zma-so'z "bir bo'lak tort" emas — "juda oson" degani. IELTS Speaking'da idioma ishlatish ballni oshiradi.

#idiom #B1 #speaking #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Goal & Effort
posts.text:
🔤 WORD OF THE DAY · B1

📌 achieve /əˈtʃiːv/ — erishmoq
📌 goal /ɡəʊl/ — maqsad
📌 effort /ˈefət/ — harakat

💬 With effort, you can achieve any goal.
(Harakat bilan har qanday maqsadga erishish mumkin.)

#vocabulary #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Shortest sentence
posts.text:
📖 DID YOU KNOW?

The shortest complete sentence in English is just two words: "I am."

🇺🇿 Ingliz tilidagi eng qisqa to'liq gap — atigi 2 so'z: "I am." (ega + fe'l). Gap to'liq bo'lishi uchun shu yetarli!

#fact #grammar #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Present Continuous
posts.text:
📚 GRAMMAR · A2 — Present Continuous

am/is/are + V-ing → hozir bo'layotgan ish

💬 I am studying now. She is reading a book.

⚠️ Xato: ❌ I studying → ✅ I am studying

#grammar #A2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: Technology
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · B2 — Technology

• device — qurilma
• social media — ijtimoiy tarmoq
• benefit — foyda
• drawback — kamchilik

💬 Smartphones have many benefits, but one drawback is that people spend too much time on social media.

✍️ IELTS Writing: foyda va kamchiliklarни muvozanat bilan yozing.

#topic #B2 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Conditionals Test
posts.text:
📝 GRAMMAR TEST · B1

If I ____ more time, I would travel.

A) have
B) had
C) will have
D) having

💭 Javob 👇
posts.answer:
✅ Javob: B) had

📖 Second Conditional: If + Past Simple, ... would + V1.

#test #grammar #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: IELTS Graph Words
posts.text:
🔤 IELTS VOCABULARY · B2

📌 increase /ɪnˈkriːs/ — oshmoq
📌 decline /dɪˈklaɪn/ — pasayish
📌 significant /sɪɡˈnɪfɪkənt/ — sezilarli

💬 There was a significant increase in sales in 2025.
(2025-yilda sotuvlar sezilarli oshdi.)

#vocabulary #B2 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Most used letter
posts.text:
🔠 DID YOU KNOW?

The most common letter in English is "E", and the most common word is "the".

🇺🇿 Ingliz tilida eng ko'p ishlatiladigan harf — "E", eng ko'p so'z esa — "the". Demak "the" ni to'g'ri ishlatishni o'rganish juda muhim!

#fact #A2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: IELTS Writing structure
posts.text:
💡 IELTS TIP — Writing Task 2

4 paragraf tuzilishi:
1️⃣ Introduction (savolni qayta yozing + fikr)
2️⃣ Body 1 (1-fikr + misol)
3️⃣ Body 2 (2-fikr + misol)
4️⃣ Conclusion (xulosa)

⏰ 40 daqiqa, 250+ so'z.
🔗 Firstly, Moreover, However, In conclusion.

#tip #IELTS #writing #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Idiom: Break the ice
posts.text:
🗣 IDIOM OF THE DAY

🧊 "break the ice" — suhbatni boshlash, muloqotni yengillashtirish

💬 He told a joke to break the ice at the meeting.
(U yig'ilishda muhitni yumshatish uchun hazil aytdi.)

#idiom #B2 #speaking #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Colors
posts.text:
🔤 COLORS · A1

📌 red /red/ — qizil
📌 blue /bluː/ — ko'k
📌 green /ɡriːn/ — yashil
📌 black /blæk/ — qora

💬 The sky is blue and the grass is green.
(Osmon ko'k, o't yashil.)

#vocabulary #A1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: My City
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · A2 — My City

• street — ko'cha
• building — bino
• market — bozor
• park — bog'

💬 I live in Qoqon. There is a big market and a beautiful park in my city.

✍️ "In my city, there is/are ___."

#topic #A2 #speaking #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Preposition Test
posts.text:
📝 PREPOSITION TEST · A2

I was born ____ 2005.

A) on
B) at
C) in
D) by

💭 Javob 👇
posts.answer:
✅ Javob: C) in

📖 Yillar: in (in 2005). Kunlar: on (on Monday). Soatlar: at (at 5).

#test #grammar #A2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: English everywhere
posts.text:
🌏 DID YOU KNOW?

Around 1.5 billion people are learning English right now — more than any other language in history!

🇺🇿 Hozir dunyoda ~1.5 milliard odam ingliz tilini o'rganmoqda — tarixda hech bir til buncha o'rganilmagan. Siz ham shu katta jamoadasiz! 💪

#fact #motivation #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Present Perfect
posts.text:
📚 GRAMMAR · B1 — Present Perfect

have/has + V3 → o'tmish + hozir bilan bog'liq natija

💬 I have finished my work. She has lived here for 5 years.

🔑 for = muddat (for 5 years), since = boshlanish (since 2020)

#grammar #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Advanced Words
posts.text:
🔤 ADVANCED · C1

📌 inevitable /ɪnˈevɪtəbl/ — muqarrar
📌 profound /prəˈfaʊnd/ — chuqur
📌 mitigate /ˈmɪtɪɡeɪt/ — yumshatmoq

💬 Technology has a profound impact on society.
(Texnologiya jamiyatga chuqur ta'sir qiladi.)

#vocabulary #C1 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: Environment
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · C1 — Environment

• climate change — iqlim o'zgarishi
• pollution — ifloslanish
• sustainable — barqaror
• renewable energy — qayta tiklanuvchi energiya

💬 Governments should invest in renewable energy to mitigate climate change.

✍️ IELTS Writing 7.0+ mavzusi.

#topic #C1 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Synonym Test
posts.text:
📝 IELTS READING · B2

"The results were remarkable."
remarkable = ?

A) ordinary
B) impressive
C) boring
D) confusing

💭 Javob 👇
posts.answer:
✅ Javob: B) impressive

📖 remarkable = ajoyib, e'tiborga loyiq. Reading'da sinonimlarni bilish muhim.

#test #IELTS #reading #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Listening: 15 vs 50
posts.text:
💡 IELTS TIP — Listening

🎧 "fifteen" (15) va "fifty" (50) — talaffuzi yaqin!
• fifTEEN → urg'u oxirida
• FIFty → urg'u boshida

Javob yozganda imloga (spelling) ham diqqat qiling — noto'g'ri imlo = 0 ball.

#tip #IELTS #listening #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Idiom: Hit the books
posts.text:
🗣 IDIOM OF THE DAY

📚 "hit the books" — qattiq o'qishga kirishmoq

💬 I have an exam tomorrow, so I need to hit the books tonight.
(Ertaga imtihonim bor, bugun kechqurun jiddiy o'qishim kerak.)

#idiom #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Feelings
posts.text:
🔤 FEELINGS · A2

📌 excited /ɪkˈsaɪtɪd/ — hayajonlangan
📌 tired /ˈtaɪəd/ — charchagan
📌 bored /bɔːd/ — zerikkan

💬 I am excited about my English progress!
(Inglizchamdagi o'sishdan hayajondaman!)

#vocabulary #A2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Newest words
posts.text:
⏳ DID YOU KNOW?

New English words are added to the dictionary every year — like "selfie", "emoji" and "vlog".

🇺🇿 Ingliz tili "tirik" til — har yili lug'atga yangi so'zlar qo'shiladi (selfie, emoji, vlog). Til doim o'sib boradi!

#fact #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Passive Voice
posts.text:
📚 GRAMMAR · B2 — Passive Voice

be + V3 → ish-harakat kimga qilingani muhim bo'lsa

💬 English is spoken in many countries.
The bridge was built in 1990.

📝 IELTS Writing'da rasmiy uslub uchun foydali.

#grammar #B2 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: Education
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · B1 — Education

• higher education — oliy ta'lim
• scholarship — stipendiya/grant
• entrance exam — kirish imtihoni
• skill — ko'nikma

💬 Many young people in Uzbekistan learn English to win scholarships and study abroad.

✍️ IELTS Speaking Part 1: "Tell me about your studies."

#topic #B1 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Advanced Test
posts.text:
📝 ADVANCED TEST · C1

The policy had a ____ effect on the economy.

A) detrimental
B) delicious
C) punctual
D) transparent

💭 Javob 👇
posts.answer:
✅ Javob: A) detrimental

📖 detrimental = zararli. delicious=mazali, punctual=aniq vaqtli, transparent=shaffof.

#test #IELTS #C1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Phrasal Verbs
posts.text:
🔤 PHRASAL VERBS · B1

📌 give up — voz kechmoq
📌 find out — bilib olmoq
📌 look for — qidirmoq

💬 Never give up — keep practicing and you will find out you can do it!
(Hech qachon voz kechmang!)

#vocabulary #B1 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Speaking: don't freeze
posts.text:
💡 IELTS TIP — Speaking

🗣 Part 2'da 2 daqiqa gapirish kerak. Sukut qilmaslik uchun:
• Vaqt yutish: "Well, that's an interesting question..."
• Misol: "For example, last year..."
• His: "I really enjoyed it because..."

Ravonlik (fluency) ham baholanadi — xatodan qo'rqmang!

#tip #IELTS #speaking #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Bilingual brain
posts.text:
🧠 DID YOU KNOW?

Learning a second language makes your brain stronger and can delay memory problems by years!

🇺🇿 Ikkinchi til o'rganish miyani kuchaytiradi va xotira muammolarini yillarga kechiktiradi. Ingliz tili — miya uchun sport! 💪

#fact #motivation #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Idiom: Once in a blue moon
posts.text:
🗣 IDIOM OF THE DAY

🌕 "once in a blue moon" — juda kam, deyarli hech qachon

💬 I eat fast food once in a blue moon.
(Men tez tayyor ovqatni juda kam yeyman.)

🇺🇿 IELTS Speaking'da chastota (frequency) so'rasa, bu idioma ajoyib javob.

#idiom #C1 #speaking #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Topic: Globalization
posts.text:
🌍 TOPIC · C1 — Globalization

ILG'OR iboralar:
• double-edged sword — ham foyda, ham zarar
• cultural exchange — madaniy almashinuv
• to bridge the gap — farqni kamaytirmoq

💬 Globalization is a double-edged sword: it boosts trade but can threaten local cultures.

✍️ IELTS Writing 7.0+ uchun.

#topic #C1 #IELTS #EnglishFreeCourse
